The tournament is organized by '''[https://www.krafton.com/en/ KRAFTON]''' and features a total prize pool of ₹2,00,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Braodcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Stage Host|lang=in |b1=Zerxes|b1flag=in|b1name=Zerxes Wadia }} {{broadcasterCard |position=Desk Host|lang=in |b1=Spero |b2=Saltyy|b2flag=in|b2name=Akash Kolay |b3=AnkiiiBOT |b4=Mazy |b5=Icybaby12 |b6=Ocean Sharma }} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Special Guests|lang=in |b1=Pramod Bhagat|b1link=wikipedia:Pramod_Bhagat|b1flag=in |b2=Rohit Tokas|b2link=wikipedia:Rohit_Tokas|b2flag=in |b3=Neeraj Chopra|b3link=wikipedia:Neeraj_Chopra|b3flag=in }} {{box|break|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Spero |b2=Ocean Sharma |b3=AnkiiiBOT |b4=Mazy }} {{BroadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |lang=English |b1=Icybaby12 |b2=Nekrou |b3=SuperJonny }} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Marathi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Darktur|b1flag=in|b1name=Chinmay R. Dey |b2=Rohanlayzz|b2flag=in |b3=Captain Price }} {{box|break|padding=1em}} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Mizo Commentator|lang=in |b1=ppa pachuau|b1flag=in|b1name=Lal remsanga |b2=|b2flag=in }} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Telugu Commentator|lang=in |b1=Fearlless Ninja|b1flag=in |b2=Lady Predator|b2flag=in|b2name=Sharon Chowdary |b3=Elica|b3flag=in|b3name=Tanvi Jasmine }} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Tamil Commentator|lang=in |b1=Vaadhiyar|b1flag=in|b1name=Asarudheen Samsudheen |b2=Randy|b2flag=in|b2name=Vishnu Priyan }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== * '''''Round 1''' : August 31st - September 3rd, 2023 ** 2048 Teams from in-game qualifiers. ** Teams divided into 128 groups with 16 squads in each group. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 3 teams}} from each group + {{bgcolortext|up|96 high ranked teams}} (Total 480 teams) will advance to ''Round 2''. * '''''Round 2''' : September 7th - 10th, 2023 ** 512 Teams. ** 480 Teams from Round 1 + Bottom 32 teams from ''The Grind week 5. ** Teams are divided into 32 groups with 16 squads in each group. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 7 teams}} from each group (Total 224 teams) advance to ''Round 3''. * '''''Round 3''' : September 14th - 17th, 2023 ** 256 Teams. ** 224 teams from ''Round-2'' + Top 32 teams from The grind ''week-5'' will be divided into 16 groups. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} from each group (Total 64 teams) advance to ''Round 4''. ** {{bgcolortext|stay|Teams ranked (65th-80th)}} (Total 16 teams) advance to additional stage called ''Losers Bracket''. * '''''Quarter Finals/Round 4''' : September 21st - 24th, 2023 ** 64 Teams from ''Round 3. ** Teams will be divided into 4 groups. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} from each group (Total 16 teams) advance to ''Semi Finals. ** {{bgcolortext|stay|Remaining 48 teams}} advance to ''Losers Bracket''. * '''''Losers Bracket''' : September 28th - October 1st, 2023 ** 64 Teams. ** 16 teams from ''Round 3'' and 48 teams from ''Quarter Finals/Round 4''. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} from each group (Total 16 teams) advance to the ''Semi Finals''. * '''''Semi Finals''' : October 4th - 7th, 2023 ** 32 teams. ** 16 teams from ''Quarter Finals/Round 4'' and 16 teams from ''Losers Bracket''. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16}} advance to the ''Grand Finals''. * '''''The Grand Finals''' : October 12th - 13th and 15th, 2023 at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Indoor Stadium , {{Flag|in}} Mumbai ** 16 teams from ''Semi Finals. ** 3 match days. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ====Points Distribution==== {{PUBGM 2021 Points System}} ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|localcurrency=inr |{{Slot|localprize= 7500000|{{Opponent|gladiators esports}} }}
